description: Schema for a bilingual guidance card. The EN fields are sourced from the guidance pipeline. The FR fields must be validated by a qualified Canadian French speaker before being presented to users.

id.description: Stable SHA-1 derived ID — same as the source guidance card ID

source_guidance_id.description: ID of the source guidance card this bilingual record is derived from

citation.description: Statute citation in English — e.g., 'Canada Labour Code, Part III, s. 230'

citation_fr.description: Statute citation in French — e.g., 'Code canadien du travail, partie III, art. 230'

law_title_en.description: Official English title of the source act or regulation

law_title_fr.description: Official French title of the source act or regulation — e.g., 'Code canadien du travail'

advisor_answer_en.description: English guidance text — generated by the guidance pipeline, reviewed for accuracy

advisor_answer_fr.description: Validated French guidance text — must be reviewed and approved by a qualified bilingual HR/legal reviewer before use. Must NOT be raw machine translation of the EN field.

advisor_answer_fr_status.description: Indicates the validation state of the French answer. Only 'approved' records may be shown to French users.

user_questions_en.description: English question prompts that this guidance card addresses

user_questions_fr.description: Validated French equivalents of the user question prompts

disclaimer_en.value: This is general HR compliance guidance, not legal advice. For high-risk matters, consult a qualified employment lawyer or HR professional.

disclaimer_fr.value: Il s'agit de renseignements généraux en conformité RH, et non de conseils juridiques. Pour les situations à risque élevé, consultez un avocat en droit de l'emploi ou un professionnel RH qualifié.

requires_escalation.description: Whether this guidance card triggers mandatory escalation

source_language.description: Language of the source XML provision

fr_reviewer.description: Name or ID of the person who validated the French text

fr_reviewed_at.description: Date the French text was reviewed
